name: autorun
description: Plan and execute dependency-aware coding workplans with full and lite workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run full or lite coding workplans
interface.longDescription: Autorun turns coding requests into project-root workplan.yaml state. Use full Autorun for MCP-assisted dependency-aware orchestration, or autorun:lite for small clear tasks that need durable progress, verification, and one commit per completed task.
